stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The cloud depicted in the figure is (1)_____. They develop mainly due to (2)_____ and their vertical extent is limited by (3)_____.

options.a: (1) Cumulus Castellanus; (2) Orographic air movement; (3) subsidence inversion.
options.c: (1) Cumulus capilatus; (2) Upwards convection; (3) troposphere inversion.
options.d: (1) Cumulus; (2) Orographic air movement; (3) troposphere inversion.
